payload_summary.evidence_boundary: Decorative mesh is an auditable data carrier and visual signature. It is not a legal conclusion, title opinion, ownership determination, valuation, or misconduct finding. Standard QR/URL fallbacks control access.

scanner_boundary: This scanner decodes UVIP-QSOM JSON, base64url sidecars, SVG metadata, and HTML embedded payloads. It does not yet perform camera/image recovery from the wavy visual modules.
